name: cgc-pms-autopilot
description: Local Codex plugin for cgc-pms AutoPilot owner workflow and closeout helpers.

interface.shortDescription: Owner skill plus safe local AutoPilot helpers.
interface.longDescription: Provides the cgc-pms AutoPilot owner skill, reusable markdown templates, and safe PowerShell helpers for checkpoint, ready issue generation, closeout, failure classification, and local commit dry-runs.
defaultPrompt: Use the cgc-pms AutoPilot owner workflow for this repo.
Generate a ready issue entry from the plugin template.
Prepare a closeout summary and dry-run local commit checks.
